reasoning: Krzysztof Stanowski is a YouTube journalist who announced his candidacy primarily to make a "mockery" of the system and expose the inner workings of Polish politics. The Polymarket price on April 3, 2025, was exactly 0.00. Given that the election is in a month (May 18, 2025) and he lacks both the intention and the popular support to win, the probability of him being the next President of Poland is practically zero.
